overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character following an NPC through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The journey transitions from sunlit open sidewalks to shadowed alleys and covered walkways beneath overpasses, showcasing dense urban cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards and steam vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a camo jacket and blue jeans along a sunlit city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing a camo jacket and carrying a backpack

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
red illuminated signage for FOODSCAFE on the building exterior
white steam venting from a pipe on the building side
futuristic cars parked along the red-painted curb
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit commercial street with the camera following an NPC in a camo jacket. Large digital billboards dominate the right side while steam vents and parked cars line the left. The environment is典型的 cyberpunk urban setting with clear skies and heavy commercial signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with trash and vendor stalls

events.description: turns right from open sidewalk into a narrow shadowed alley filled with debris
enters deep shadow as the camera moves under building overhangs away from direct sunlight
exits the alley back onto the main street under an overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning right to follow the camo jacket character through a narrow trash-filled alleyway

notable_agents.action: leading the way through the cluttered alley, navigating around trash piles

entered.detail: small street vendor stall with a green canopy and metal frame
large black garbage bags and scattered debris piled against the wall
stacked cardboard boxes and wooden crates near the vendor stall
red and brown metal barrels used for trash storage

segments.scene_description: The camera turns sharply right into a narrow service alley, transitioning from bright sunlight to deep shadow. The path winds past a green vendor stall and piles of trash bags and cardboard boxes. The segment ends as the camera emerges back onto the main street, now positioned under a massive overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shops under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing a pawn shop and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead at a steady pace along the covered walkway

entered.detail: storefront with green trim and a prominent PAWNSHOP sign above the entrance
bright green circular neon sign with OPEN text and an arrow
massive concrete and steel elevated highway casting shadows over the street
tall narrow digital advertisement screen on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the scene features mixed lighting with sunlight filtering through gaps. A pawn shop with a bright green neon OPEN sign dominates the right side. The camera continues following the camo jacket character along the covered walkway, with tall vertical billboards visible on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep covered walkway with neon advertisements and overhead pipes

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass where neon signs and large industrial pipes line the walkway

notable_agents.action: walking deeper into the covered area with neon lights reflecting off surfaces

entered.detail: large blue and red advertisement billboard for CHOOH2 fuel
massive cylindrical industrial pipes running along the ceiling under the overpass
various shops with bright neon signage including cyan and red lights

segments.scene_description: The walkway descends deeper under the overpass where natural light fades and neon artificial lighting dominates. Large industrial pipes run overhead along the ceiling. The CHOOH2 billboard is prominent on the left while various neon-lit storefronts line the right side, creating a classic cyberpunk undercity atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking garage entrance under overpass with steam vents

events.description: passing an active steam vent releasing white vapor near the parking entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a parking garage entrance with steam vents, continuing into the darker tunnel section

notable_agents.action: walking past the parking garage entrance and steam vents

entered.detail: parking garage entrance with yellow MARK 24 signage and green roll-up doors
ground-level vent actively releasing white steam onto the sidewalk
yellow and black striped construction barriers near the parking entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a parking garage entrance marked with yellow signage reading MARK 24. Active steam vents release white vapor onto the path. The camera passes yellow construction barriers and continues deeper under the overpass where the large overhead pipes now dominate the ceiling at close range, and the tunnel ahead grows darker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit commercial thoroughfare into the shadowed, neon-drenched depths of an urban underpass. It begins on a wide street dominated by digital billboards and steam vents, following a character in a camo jacket before turning sharply into a narrow service alley filled with trash and vendor stalls. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene shifts beneath a massive overpass where sunlight filters through gaps, passing a pawn shop with a glowing green neon sign. The walkway then descends further into the undercity, causing natural light to fade as industrial overhead pipes and prominent CHOOH2 billboards take over the visual space. Finally, the camera passes yellow construction barriers and active steam vents at a parking garage entrance, moving deeper into a darkening tunnel where the heavy industrial ceiling looms close.
